title: 20 years of service for 3 SWD employees Cricket employees
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Three dedicated employees of SWD Cricket (SWDC) were recognised for two decades of continuous service during a special awards ceremony held at the Wilderness Hotel on Friday 21 June.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Three dedicated employees of SWD Cricket (SWDC) were recognised for two decades of continuous service during a special awards ceremony held at the Wilderness Hotel on Friday 21 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Among the recipients was Chief Executive Officer Albertus Kennedy, who initially, joined SWD Cricket in September 2004 as general manager when the full-time administrative office was established."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His position was later elevated to CEO in 2010, a role in which he has played a key part in the organisation's development and success over the years.","html":"His position was later elevated to CEO in 2010, a role in which he has played a key part in the organisation's development and success over the years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Zenobia Nel, the human resource administrator and executive assistant, was also honoured. She began her journey with SWD Cricket in October 2004 as an administrative assistant and has since become a central figure in the organisation's day-to-day operations and internal coordination.","html":"Zenobia Nel, the human resource administrator and executive assistant, was also honoured. She began her journey with SWD Cricket in October 2004 as an administrative assistant and has since become a central figure in the organisation's day-to-day operations and internal coordination."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The third recipient was Pieter Stuurman, a former first-class cricketer for SWD Cricket. Stuurman began his career at the organisation as a development coach and has been serving as the club and facilities co-ordinator since 2012, contributing significantly to the growth of cricket infrastructure and club development across the region.","html":"The third recipient was Pieter Stuurman, a former first-class cricketer for SWD Cricket. Stuurman began his career at the organisation as a development coach and has been serving as the club and facilities co-ordinator since 2012, contributing significantly to the growth of cricket infrastructure and club development across the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michelle Weyers, a non-independent director at SWD Cricket, applauded the employees for their commitment, dedication and sacrifices in paving the success of SWD Cricket.","html":"Michelle Weyers, a non-independent director at SWD Cricket, applauded the employees for their commitment, dedication and sacrifices in paving the success of SWD Cricket."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
